section.heading: Approval of applications

subsection.heading: Criteria
subsection.chapeau: The State shall establish criteria for approval of applications under this section. Such criteria shall include—

paragraph.content: consideration of the local district’s need for, and inability to locally provide for, the activities, equipment, library and instructional materials requested;
the number and nature of elementary and secondary students who will benefit from the planned program; and
the expressed level of financial and in-kind commitment from other parties to the program.

subsection.heading: Approval procedures
subsection.chapeau: The State shall adopt approval procedures designed to ensure that grants are equitably distributed among—

paragraph.content: rural, urban, and suburban areas; and
small, medium, and large local educational agencies.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 98–377, title III, § 327, as added Pub. L. 100–418, title VI, § 6031(a)(2), Aug. 23, 1988, 102 Stat. 1482.)
